appDesc.message: Organize your downloads automatically! Set custom download locations based on filetype, filename, or source domain.

msg_welcome.message:
Thank you for installing Downloads Router!
Please read the instructions below, then head over to the routing rules to configure the extension.

msg_invalid_order.message: Invalid ruleset hierarchy, resetting to default.

routingDesc.message: Please provide destination folders delimited by forward slash (/).

routingDescSub.message: Destinations must be located within the base downloads folder; use symbolic links to circumvent this restriction (see usage instructions).

ruleOrderDesc.message: Specify the order in which you would like the tables traversed.

globalRefDesc.message: Enable this checkbox to make all downloads (not preceded by another explicit rule) be stored in a folder with the same name as the source domain.

referrerNote1.message: Do not include http:// or www. Other subdomains, such as images.domain.com, are required.

referrerNote2.message: Larger websites often utilize Content Distribution Networks, which means that the referrer for a certain image might not be the same as the domain of the website you are visiting.

filenameNote.message: * Keywords are case-insensitive. Recommended basic usage is a single keyword per rule. The keyword is treated directly as a regular expression.

commonMimeDesc.message: This table contains a few common MIME types that might help you set up your routing configuration.

advancedKeywordsDesc.message: A few helpful tricks for more powerful filename-based routing.
